actual.summary: 17/18 scorable (VIX API empty). OIL surged +7.78% to $100.83 — validates Hormuz supply disruption thesis. Safe-haven thesis continues failing. DXY slightly reversed.

oil_disruption.evidence: WTI $93.55 → $100.83 (+7.78%). First $100 break. XLE flat = market skepticism about sustainability.

safe_haven.evidence: GLD -3.06%, TLT flat, XLU flat despite oil +7.78% and geopolitical tension.

actual.key_finding: Oil-XLE divergence is the most analytically informative signal. WTI +7.78% but XLE -0.08% = market prices oil spike as temporary. Testable: if oil >$100 for 1 week and XLE still flat, temporary-spike thesis validates.
